name: Baci Di Dama ( Orange Almond Cookies )
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the ground almonds, sugar, orange peel, and all but 1 tablespoon of the flour.
2. Mix well, then stir in enough milk to give a smooth, firm dough.
3. Roll the dough into small balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with greased wax paper, ensuring they are well apart.
4. Sprinkle the remaining flour over the cookies.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely.
7. When cooled, sandwich the cookies together in pairs with the melted chocolate.
8. Chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour before serving.
Makes 12-15
